page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4g.16xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. This instance features 64 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, resulting in 64 vCPUs. It is configured with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

The instance includes 3839 GB of bundled local SSD storage, making it suitable for applications requiring direct, high-capacity local disk access. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps. The virtualization layer is managed via the KVM hypervisor. No graphics processing units are included in this hardware profile.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.i4g.16xlarge offers a high density of local SSD storage relative to its compute and memory resources. This hardware profile is designed for workloads such as relational databases, NoSQL data stores, transactional processing systems, and other storage-intensive applications that benefit from low-latency local storage and dedicated CPU execution.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4g.16xlarge is an x86_64 server instance utilizing the KVM hypervisor and powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. It features 64 dedicated physical cores with one thread per core, providing 64 vCPUs alongside 256.0 GB of RAM, which equates to 4.0 GB of memory per core. The instance is equipped with 3839 GB of bundled local SSD storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. It does not include GPU acceleration. This hardware configuration is designed for storage-intensive and database workloads that require dedicated CPU resources and high-capacity local storage.

tagline: A dedicated x86_64 server configuration featuring sixty-four physical cores, balanced memory allocation, and high-capacity local SSD storage.
